Deontological ethics focuses on duty and moral rules, so the best response adheres to a principle of obligation (e.g., prioritizing responsibilities over personal preferences or circumstances). Option C explicitly acknowledges a duty (working on a paper) rather than dismissing the request based on personal feelings (D) or external conditions (A/B). This aligns with the idea of acting from a sense of moral duty rather than consequences or inclinations.
